title: Criminal history information; access to federal tax information
doc_html:
NOTE: §51.3 eff. until Oct. 1, 2027. See Acts 2025, No. 477.

§51.3. Criminal history information; access to federal tax information

            The Department of Children and Family Services, office of child support enforcement and family support, is authorized to perform criminal history records checks of current and prospective employees, contractors, and subcontractors in accordance with the procedures provided in R.S. 15:587.5. Pursuant to this authorization and to implement the requirements of R.S. 15:587.5, the secretary shall promulgate rules and regulations with regard to this matter.

NOTE: §51.3 as amended by Acts 2025, No. 477, eff. Oct. 1, 2027.

§51.3. Criminal history information; access to federal tax information

            The Department of Children and Family Services is authorized to perform criminal history records checks of current and prospective employees, contractors, and subcontractors in accordance with the procedures provided in R.S. 15:587.5. Pursuant to this authorization and to implement the requirements of R.S. 15:587.5, the secretary shall promulgate rules and regulations with regard to this matter.

            Acts 2017, No. 147, §5, eff. June 12, 2017; Acts 2025, No. 477, §15, eff. Oct. 1, 2027.
